testcase.name: test_page_navigation_features

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('a.transition-all.font-medium').nth(0)". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? Call log: - waiting for page.locator('a.transition-all.font-medium').nth(0)

testcase.failure: tests/consolidated/test_consolidated.py:18: in test_page_navigation_features page.locator("page.locator('a.transition-all.font-medium').nth(0)").click() ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:15631: in click self._sync( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:162: in click return await self._frame._click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:566: in _click await self._channel.send("click", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('a.transition-all.font-medium').nth(0)". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? E Call log: E - waiting for page.locator('a.transition-all.font-medium').nth(0)

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_02

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('#benchmarks')' Actual value: https://grok4.me/#features Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://grok4.me/#features"

testcase.failure: tests/page_1_cdbd/test_page_1_cdbd.py:24: in test_TC_Navigation_02 expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(r"#benchmarks")) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('#benchmarks')' E Actual value: https://grok4.me/#features E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E 9 × unexpected value "https://grok4.me/#features"

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 'https://grok.com' Actual value: https://grok4.me/ Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://grok4.me/"
